About FatawaLib

What FatawaLib Is

FatawaLib is a curated library of translated Islamic fatwas, built to help English-speaking readers access rulings from trusted scholars with clear links to the original source material.

Scholars Included

The library features translations from senior scholars, including well-known scholars from the Salafi scholarly tradition. Each entry identifies the issuing scholar and source URL.

Translation Disclaimer

All translations are provided for educational benefit. They may not fully capture every nuance of the original Arabic text. For precision and personal religious questions, consult qualified scholars directly.

Contact

For corrections or inquiries, contact: fatawalib@example.com

فتاوى

FatawaLib: translations of Islamic legal rulings from senior scholars.

Translations are provided for educational purposes.

Always refer to a qualified scholar for personal guidance.

2026 FatawaLib
